# nomad_node_pool (Data Source)

Get information about a node pool in Nomad.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_node_pool" "dev" {
  name = "dev"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name for this node pool.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for this node pool.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `meta` (Map of String) Metadata associated with the node pool
- `node_identity_ttl` (String) The TTL applied to node identities issued to nodes in this pool.
- `scheduler_config` (Set of Object) Scheduler configuration for the node pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scheduler_config))

<a id="nestedatt--scheduler_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scheduler_config`

Read-Only:

- `memory_oversubscription` (String)
- `scheduler_algorithm` (String)
